text: Scarlett Thomas watched as the last stragglers stumbled towards the exit, their pockets bulging with bottle openers and branded coasters. Despite the chaos, a small smile played on Scarlett Thomas's lips. After all, in the world of craft beer, there was always another festival just around the corner – and hopefully, this time, Scarlett Thomas would remember to wear shoes with better traction on beer-soaked floors.
context: This is the concluding paragraph, describing the end of the craft beer festival and Scarlett's reflections on the day.
